testcase.name: test_lockout_after_five_failures_then_clears_on_success
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_tiffinflow_p1.py:81: in test_lockout_after_five_failures_then_clears_on_success assert r6.status_code == 429, f"expected 429 lockout, got {r6.status_code}: {r6.text}" E AssertionError: expected 429 lockout, got 200: {"user":{"id":"68e5c70a-f07c-4fe6-b32d-ecf90a439f04","email":"test_p1_cbe3e64a@example.com","full_name":"P1 Test","phone":"+919999999999","role":"customer","address_summary":null,"geo_lat":null,"geo_lng":null,"dietary_tags":[],"wallet_balance":100.0,"onboarded":false,"created_at":"2026-05-12T04:26:04.838598+00:00"},"access_token":"eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiI2OGU1YzcwYS1mMDdjLTRmZTYtYjMyZC1lY2Y5MGE0MzlmMDQiLCJlbWFpbCI6InRlc3RfcDFfY2JlM2U2NGFAZXhhbXBsZS5jb20iLCJyb2xlIjoiY3VzdG9tZXIiLCJleHAiOjE3Nzg2MDMxNjcsInR5cGUiOiJhY2Nlc3MifQ.q8SWvYcKnFGVBm73kiJpSrvT7rYaa2BfHM0kTT57_jk"} E assert 200 == 429 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_cod_disabled_blocks_orders_and_subscriptions
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_tiffinflow_p1.py:243: in test_cod_disabled_blocks_orders_and_subscriptions assert r_s.status_code == 400, ( E AssertionError: Expected 400 when COD disabled for subscription, got 200: {"status":"active","subscription":{"id":"8bd4c6f8-72c5-493f-b7e6-b4fe85c1ea19","user_id":"d06273cf-b91f-4ec7-a96d-e195fb1a9baa","plan_id":"4b6fa482-cad3-4e0d-a8ce-2e7e65d3c8e7","plan_name":"Weekly Plan","meals_left":7,"total_meals":7,"starts_at":"2026-05-12","expires_at":"2026-05-19","paused_dates":[],"delivered_dates":[],"status":"active","payment_status":"cod_pending","created_at":"2026-05-12T04:26:14.059694+00:00"},"cod":true} E assert 200 == 400 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code
